Metadata.title: Mohd Hanif Mohamad - Pegawai Tadbir UPSI
Metadata.description: Pegawai Tadbir at Universiti Pendidikan Sultan Idris (UPSI).

Hero.name: Mohd Hanif Mohamad
Hero.tagline: Dedicated administrative professional with over 17 years of service at Universiti Pendidikan Sultan Idris.

About.heading: About Me
About.bio_1: Ability to balance workloads efficiently and analytically, with the flexibility to adjust in a constantly changing environment. Skilled in computer programming and internet savvy with excellent verbal and written communication abilities.
About.bio_2: Highly committed to maintaining confidentiality in handling sensitive issues. Flexible and able to work under pressure while delivering quality results consistently.
About.quote_text: Successful people do what unsuccessful people are not willing to do. Don't wish it were easier; wish you were better.

Education.heading: Education
Education.subtitle: Academic qualifications and achievements.
Education.edu2_qualification: Diploma in Sports and Recreation Management

Skills.heading: Skills & Competencies
Skills.subtitle: Professional skills and competencies developed throughout my career.

Experience.heading: Work Experience
Experience.subtitle: My professional journey at Universiti Pendidikan Sultan Idris (UPSI).
Experience.exp1_company: Office of Deputy Vice Chancellor (Research & Innovation)
Experience.exp1_description: Overseeing administrative operations at the Office of Deputy Vice Chancellor for Research and Innovation.
Experience.exp2_description: Managing administrative functions and supporting educational innovation initiatives.
Experience.exp3_description: Coordinating transportation logistics and administrative operations.
Experience.exp4_description: Handling administrative duties for the university's publishing office.
Experience.exp5_description: Supporting faculty administration and academic programme coordination.
Experience.exp6_description: Managing co-curricular activities administration and student development programmes.

Awards.heading: Awards & Recognition
Awards.subtitle: Honours and achievements throughout my career.

Works.heading: Works & Digital Impact
Works.subtitle: Digital systems and platforms I've built throughout my career at UPSI.
Works.work1_description: Developed an open data website for Pejabat Karang Mengarang (Penerbit UPSI), making institutional publications and resources publicly accessible online.
Works.work2_description: Built an automated system to calculate and process vehicle fuel usage logs for the Transportation Department, eliminating manual computation and improving accuracy.
Works.work3_description: Developed a comprehensive web platform for neoteric education curriculum development, featuring an automated lesson plan generator and standard curriculum document system.
